context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct ElevenLabs JavaScript SDK package and API patterns for batch transcription with timestamps and language detection. Evaluates correct package selection, import paths, API method usage, and response field handling.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: package.json lists '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' as a dependency, NOT 'elevenlabs' (the deprecated v1.x package)

checklist.name: Correct client import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabsClient from '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' (not from 'elevenlabs' or other packages)

checklist.name: Correct API method
checklist.description: Uses client.speechToText.convert() method (camelCase JS convention) for batch transcription

checklist.name: Correct model ID
checklist.description: Uses modelId: 'scribe_v2' (not whisper, scribe_v1, or other model names)

checklist.name: Word timestamps requested
checklist.description: Passes timestampsGranularity: 'word' (or equivalent) parameter to get word-level timing

checklist.name: Language code parameter
checklist.description: Passes languageCode parameter using an ISO 639-1 or ISO 639-3 code (e.g., 'eng', 'spa', 'fra', 'en', 'es', 'fr')

checklist.name: Language detection output
checklist.description: Accesses result.languageCode and result.languageProbability (or equivalent camelCase/snake_case fields) from the response

checklist.name: Uses createReadStream
checklist.description: Uses fs.createReadStream() (or equivalent stream) to read the audio file for the API call, not reading entire file into memory as buffer

checklist.name: Word timing fields
checklist.description: Accesses word.start and word.end fields from the response words array to generate SRT timestamps

checklist.name: Word type awareness
checklist.description: Code checks or filters on word.type (e.g., filtering for type==='word') when processing the response words

checklist.name: File read with fs
checklist.description: Imports from 'fs' or 'node:fs' for file operations
